blockingIssues.description: Accepted nested built-in `Option`/`Result` patterns with Copy payloads still lower through flat-only codegen helpers, so valid nested bindings can emit invalid Go with missing identifiers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` must be false whenever workers skip documented tests-first or ownership-validation requirements, including the tests-first expectation and the negative-compile-plus-positive-runtime requirement for ownership-sensitive work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both round-4 fix reviews reported `followedProcedure: true` despite documented deviations: `ownership-nested-builtin-pattern-boundaries` followed a tests-later workflow after exploratory investigation, and `ownership-final-return-fast-path-cleanup` documented only positive compile/runtime validation even though the skill requires a negative compile path plus a positive runtime path for ownership work.
